subject: Nacli, a small rocky mineral-textured Pokemon resembling a salt crystal or stone block with a face, set against an urban-looking background
description: A small, roughly cuboid creature with a rocky, crystalline or mineral-textured surface stands in what appears to be an urban or constructed environment. The creature has a simple face embedded in its stone-like body, giving it a golem-like appearance. Its coloring is earthy grey-brown with some variation suggesting salt or mineral deposits. The background features structures suggesting a city or town setting with warm ambient light. The creature faces toward the viewer in a grounded, still pose.
foreground: small blocky mineral-textured creature with a face, golem-like appearance
background: urban or constructed environment with warm ambient light
